name: ask-read-then-summarize
description: Agent reads a code file and provides a summary of its purpose

turns.user: Read server.go and summarize what it does.

responses.text: server.go is a simple Go HTTP server that listens on port 9090 and exposes a single /health endpoint. The health handler responds with HTTP 200 and the text "ok", making it suitable as a basic health check service.
